message:
fix(plan): guard dag_depth against out-of-bounds plan node index

depth_of() would panic with an index-out-of-bounds if id.index() was
>= memo.len(), which can happen with malformed or externally-supplied
DAGs where node IDs are sparse or reference non-existent predecessors.
Now returns 0 for any unknown node index, treating it as a leaf with
no dependencies rather than crashing the plan analysis pass.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
